sections.paragraph:
to scatter (a kindred root to זָרָה, זָרַע)-(a) dry things, such as dust, Job 2:12 2Ch 34:4 cinders, Exo 9:8, 10 live coals, Eze 10:2.-(b) more often liquid things (to sprinkle, fprengen), such as water, Num 19:13 blood, Exo 24:6 29:16 , 20 Exo 29:20 Lev 1:5, 11 3:2 , and often besides. Followed by עַל to sprinkle upon, Exod. loc. cit. Intrans. Hos 7:9, שֵׂיבָה זָרְֽקָה בֹו גַּם “grey hairs also are scattered upon him.” Compare the Lat. spargere, in the same sense, Prop. iii. 4, 24, and Arab. ذرأ to scatter, Med. E. to be grey on the front of the head (prop. to be sprinkled over with grey hairs, to begin to be grey).

Pual, pass. Num 19:13, 20 Num 19:20.

[Hence מִזְרַק.]

I.
